g.text: MIGRATION STRATEGIES used at the facade:

text.tspan: 2. GET /users/* (5% shadow) u2192 new AND legacy, compare
4. /catalog/* if user in beta-list u2192 new-catalog-svc

g.text: DARK LAUNCH u2014 send request to BOTH, return legacy response, compare new in background
SHADOW TRAFFIC u2014 send N% to new for validation; legacy is still source of truth
CANARY ROUTE u2014 route N% real users to new, fall back to legacy on error
FEATURE-FLAG GATED u2014 specific users / regions hit new code
FULL CUTOVER u2014 once confident: 100% to new; legacy code removed later
